fields.expected_topics: Subset of topics the answer must cover
fields.family: One of: comparator, cdac, sar-logic, bootstrap, ldo, integration, tradeoffs

schema.note: Reimplemented for eda-agents Session 7. Authored from first principles referencing our in-tree SAR topologies (sar_adc_8bit, sar_adc_8bit_behavioral, sar_adc_11bit). Not derived verbatim from any external corpus.

tasks.prompt: Explain why enlarging the StrongARM input pair improves offset but degrades the CDAC top-plate settling, and quantify the tradeoff for an 11-bit converter at IHP VDD=1.2 V.
At what input-pair W*L does a StrongARM comparator cross the offset budget for a 1 V full-scale differential 11-bit SAR? Assume A_VT = 4 mV.um.
When should an agent prefer SARADC8BitBehavioralTopology over the transistor-level 8-bit topology for autoresearch?
Walk through why an 11-bit binary-weighted CDAC needs 1024:1 capacitor ratios and what mismatch this causes in a CMIM implementation.
Larger CDAC unit capacitance reduces kT/C noise but costs power and settling. Derive when kT/C stops dominating ENOB at 11 bits and 1 MHz.
Describe a split-capacitor array for an 11-bit SAR and argue why or why not it beats a plain binary array in this repository's flow.
The 11-bit flow uses T_algo = T / 22 at 1 MHz. Justify the factor 22 and describe what changes for a 12-bit port.
Derive a metastability BER bound given a regeneration time constant tau_regen and an evaluate pulse T_pw, and show how check_system_validity uses it.
Compare the synchronous Verilator SAR FSM shipped here with an asynchronous comparator-ready SAR. What would break if we swapped the Verilog for async logic?
Explain why the SAR topologies in this tree use ideal sampling switches and what must change before an agent can trust an HD3 claim below -70 dBc.
For a real bootstrap NMOS switch sampling at 1 MHz with 1 V signal on a 100 fF top plate, estimate W_switch_um and C_boot_fF. Explain the assumptions.
Why is there no LDO in the current SAR netlist and what would its absence hide in a Walden FoM measurement?
Outline a PSRR budget for an LDO feeding this 11-bit SAR. Break it down by which SAR block tolerates what supply ripple.
The validator flags reference settling when tau > T_algo_PW / 3. Reproduce the computation and explain what R_on of the CDAC switches contributes.
Describe the differential pairing between positive and negative CDAC arrays in SARADC11BitTopology and what symmetry violations would bias the codes.
adc_bridge uses in_low=0.2, in_high=0.8 at IHP VDD=1.2 V. What changes when porting to GF180 at 3.3 V?
Why does the 11-bit topology pick M=9 and N=128 for the coherent FFT, and what breaks if you lower M to 5?
compute_system_fom applies a penalty per violation in check_system_validity. Explain why the penalty is linear rather than hard-zero and when that can mislead autoresearch.
Identify every point in the 11-bit topology that depends on PdkConfig. If ihp-sg13cmos5l lands tomorrow, what else must be verified?
Sketch a concrete path from the current 11-bit design_reference to a 12-bit validated design. Identify which blocks survive unchanged and which need a rewrite.
